title: Shadowland
overview: As dark clouds portend the coming of an invasion force, five warriors arrive to battle the threat.

title: Glory for Anubis
overview: Talpa dispatches his warlord Anubis to find Mia as a way of drawing out the warriors.

title: Secret of Wildfire
overview: With the warriors scattered across the world, Mia and Ully go in search of Ryo.

title: The Search Begins
overview: Ryo, Mia and Ully seek help from Mia's grandfather, who suspiciously refuses to help them.

title: Halo's Prison
overview: Mia uses a line from her grandfather's poem to find Sage, but Sekhmet tracks them down.

title: The Counter Attack
overview: The gang heads to the Sea of Toyama to find Cye, where Ryo must brave a whirlpool to rescue him.

title: Splitting the Stone
overview: Mia and Sage look for Kento and come up against harsh weather, wild wolves, and a determined Cale.

title: Friend or Foe
overview: Ryo and Cye set out to rescue Rowen from Dais, whose illusions turn the warriors against each other.

title: Wildfire in the Sky
overview: The team splits up to learn what Talpa has planned for Rowen, who is lost somewhere in space.

title: In the Sea of the Sky
overview: Ryo attempts to break free of the dark matrix while his allies on the ground battle Talpa.

title: Assault on the Dynasty
overview: Dais lures the heroes into a trap within the castle gates and separates them from their armor.

title: Shallow Darkness
overview: As the heroes approach Talpa's castle, the enemy attacks and succeeds in splitting up the team.

title: Fate of the Ronin Armor
overview: Talpa enacts a plan to turn the heroes to evil based on his knowledge of their armors' dark origins.

title: Armor of Life
overview: Anubis fights the heroes at an amusement park and a fearful Kento tries to fight without his armor.

title: The Ancient's Battle
overview: The Ancient One reveals the nature of the mystical armors; Anubis rethinks his loyalty to Talpa.

title: Raid on Talpa's Castle
overview: The heroes reach Talpa's castle and face the combined might of Talpa's dark forces.

title: The Legend of the Armor
overview: Talpa dons his warlords' armors to directly attack the heroes and steal their armors for himself.

title: Talpa's Triumph
overview: Ryo must find a way to defeat Talpa without destroying his captured friends.

title: Wildfire's Fight Against Fate
overview: The Ancient One helps Ryo resist Talpa's attempt to absorb him into his armor.

title: Ronin vs. Saranbo
overview: A new threat named Saranbo arrives to claim the Inferno Armor for himself.

title: Ryo's Mega Armor
overview: A regretful Ryo abandons the team over Mia's objections to face Saranbo alone.

title: Saber Stryke's Deadly Challenge
overview: Lord Saber Stryke and his tiger attack the heroes over possession of powerful swords.

title: White Blaze's Sacrifice
overview: With the heroes in need of the Soul Swords, White Blaze risks his life to steal them.

title: Sun Devil: Ambassador of Evil
overview: On the way to investigate a volcano, the heroes encounter a foe who wants to test their strength.

title: Torrent's Evil Twin
overview: Sekhmet creates an evil duplicate of Cye to subdue the real one.

title: The Armor Must Be Destroyed
overview: Sage fights a battle of wills when Cale attempts to convince him he is capable of great evil.

title: Sand Blasted
overview: Kento must learn to rely on more than his brute strength to win fights.

title: Lady Kayura and the Dark Realm
overview: Rowen and Ryo encounter Lady Kayura and learn Talpa's forces have captured their friends.

title: Anubis Is Reborn
overview: Ryo and Rowen encounter a familiar face who pledges to help them.

title: Talpa Turns the Tide
overview: Anubis attempts to gain Mia and Ully's trust and explains his past; Talpa creates a new weapon.

title: Legend of the White Armor
overview: Dala attacks Ryo and Rowen with Talpa's new sword, which allows him to use their friends' powers.

title: Strategies of the Nether World
overview: The villains attempt to take control of Ryo's armor, unwittingly revealing another aspect of it.

title: In Search of Secret Treasures
overview: Anubis and Mia come across something important in Mia's grandfather's research.

title: Strata's Defiant Stand
overview: Mia and Anubis try to puzzle out how to use the Jewel of Life to defeat Anubis.

title: The Warriors Return
overview: Rowan sacrifices himself to help Ryo and the others fend off Lady Kayura.

title: Cheap Tricks
overview: Sage and Rowen defend Mia and Ully, who possess the Jewel of Life, from Talpa's minions.

title: Anubis' Armor Revived
overview: The heroes take a much-needed rest to prepare for the final showdown with Talpa.

title: Lady Evil Sees the Light
overview: Anubis battles a possessed Lady Kayura in the hopes of freeing her from the bonds of evil.

title: Triumphant Warriors
overview: Lady Kayura and the warlords fight alongside the heroes to stop Talpa before he destroys the world.
